description: Single-file Python project with two planted defects, hermetic run (network: none, no token — Community is free). Proves qodana-python-community builds (base + conda + dist + cli + runtime), loads the Qodana plugin from the dist custom-plugins, and scans a real .py producing SARIF. The Community dist reports the Pro product code (driver QDPY). Driver name + rule ids pinned from CI run 27876312623.

expectations.reason: The planted `unused = 42` local that is never read surfaces as PyUnusedLocalInspection (pinned from CI run 27876312623; enabled in the Community profile).
`Greeter.shout` never uses `self`, so PyMethodMayBeStaticInspection reports (pinned from CI run 27876312623).
